reasoning: Severe packet loss on the downlink of the A1 interface prevents the Non-RT RIC from communicating policy updates and guidance to the Near-RT RIC, causing downstream failures in E2 and F1 interfaces.
actionable_steps: 1. Inspect the physical and virtual links between Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC. 2. Check for network congestion or faulty NICs on the A1 interface path. 3. Verify A1 interface transport layer configuration (MTU sizes, QoS settings).
